headline: AMD’s new pitch: our old tech is so good you should just keep using it
summary: AMD is relaunching older components at Computex 2026. The company promises users won't need immediate upgrades. This strategy aims to combat current tech challenges like "RAMageddon."

headline: The QD-OLED gaming monitor that started it all got a big upgrade
summary: Alienware unveils a successor to its original QD-OLED gaming monitor. The new model features a refreshed design and high-end specifications. Announced at Computex 2026, it will launch later this year.

headline: Dell is bringing back the XPS 13 as a MacBook Neo competitor — with a temporary discount to $599
summary: Dell is relaunching the XPS 13 as a budget-friendly laptop. It will be available in July with an initial student discount of $599. The price will increase to $699 after the back-to-school promotion ends.

headline: Apple’s strategy for smart glasses is the same as smart watches
summary: Apple aims to revolutionize the entire eyewear market, not just compete in smart glasses. Its strategy mirrors the Apple Watch launch, targeting traditional brands. Bloomberg's Mark Gurman reports on Apple's ambitious plans.

headline: Rick and Morty Season 9, Episode 2 Review: "Ricks Days, Seven Nights"
summary: Rick and Morty Season 9, Episode 2, titled "Ricks Days, Seven Nights," has been reviewed. The episode is praised as a "banger" for its cleverness. It is also noted for being "brutally depressing."

headline: Alienware’s New Super Ultrawide OLED Gaming Monitor Might Just Earn Its (RGB) Stripes
summary: Alienware introduces a new Super Ultrawide OLED gaming monitor. The monitor aims to stand out with its advanced features. It promises an immersive gaming experience.

headline: Emilia Clarke Admits 'No One Liked' Secret Invasion or Solo But Knows 'It's Not Personal'
summary: Emilia Clarke acknowledges the negative reception of "Secret Invasion" and "Solo: A Star Wars Story." She understands that criticism of these projects is "not personal." The actress has been involved in several controversial productions.

headline: Masters of the Universe Gets Last-Minute Imax Confirmation as Star Wars Makes Room
summary: "Masters of the Universe" has secured last-minute Imax screenings. This became possible as "Star Wars: The Mandalorian and Grogu" vacated Imax slots early. The film's theatrical rollout will now include large-screen format options.

headline: Second batch of Mandelson files to be published on Monday
summary: A second batch of Mandelson files will be released on Monday. These documents are described as one of the largest parliamentary publications ever. A government spokesperson confirmed the upcoming release.

headline: Israel seizes castle in Lebanon as it expands ground offensive
summary: Israel has seized a strategic castle in Lebanon. PM Netanyahu calls it a "decisive shift" in the campaign against Hezbollah. European governments are criticizing the escalation of the offensive.

headline: NHS single patient record to be debated for first time
summary: A single NHS patient record system will be debated for the first time. Government projections suggest it could reduce A&E visits by 20,000 annually. The proposed reforms aim to streamline the NHS records system.

headline: Between celebration and confrontation: Paris after PSG victory
summary: Paris experienced clashes and arrests after the Champions League final. Nearly 800 people were arrested following confrontations with police. The city saw a mix of celebration and conflict post-PSG victory.
